name: SPYRAL MISSION - Assault
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＰＹＲＡＬ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スパイラル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＭＩＳＳＩＯＮ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミッション</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>強</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Destroy this card during your 3rd End Phase after activation. Once per turn, if a "SPYRAL" monster you control destroys a monster by battle, or if you destroy a card(s) on the field with a "SPYRAL" monster's effect you control: You can draw 1 card. You can banish this card from your Graveyard; Special Summon 1 "SPYRAL" monster from your hand.
eff: Destroy this card during your 3rd End Phase after activation. Once per turn, if a "SPYRAL" monster you control destroys a monster by battle, or if you destroy a card(s) on the field with a "SPYRAL" monster's effect you control: You can draw 1 card. You can banish this card from your Graveyard; Special Summon 1 "SPYRAL" monster from your hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
